title: Ability to search when field mapping for integrations
excerpt:
Request: 
The ability to search when field mapping. Right now we have to scroll through and find the fields manually. This is prone to error when there’s a lot of fields and makes it harder to find things.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
